programme.desc: Join stand-up paddling legend Mike Simpson on his circumnavigation of Puerto Rico, and experience catching 150lb tarpon from a kayak.

programme.title: Xplash Ep105
programme.desc: Xplash brings you eye-popping water-related action from around the globe. In this episode, we’ll visit Bandon, Oregon to check out the creation of a sandy labyrinth; ride on the Billabong Clipper to surf remote locations around the globe; and get a taste of the multi-sport party known as the Swatch Free-4-Style.

programme.title: Water Matters Ep101 - Freshwater
programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep107: Jet Sprinting V8 Superboat Championships from Cabarita Beach – New South Wales, Australia
programme.desc: Jet Sprinting from Cabarita Beach in New South Wales, Australia. V8 Unlimited Superboats are the top racing class in Jet Sprinting with the boats being unrestricted.

programme.title: Blue World Ep803: Atlantic Wolffish in Maine, USA + Cozumel’s Aerolito Cave
programme.desc: Blue World heads to northern Maine to meet a famous Atlantic wolffish couple named Bob and Jane, and learn how they catch crabs for dinner. Then Blue World travels to Cozumel to explore a cave containing some of the most unique and rare cave fauna in the world.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep206: Poseidon Games…Hydroflight – Australia + World Kiteboarding Championships
programme.desc: Australia’s Gold Coast is home to the Poseidon Games where high-tech has birthed a new watersport called Hydroflight; then we recap the full season of the World Kiteboarding Championship Tour.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep104: Stand-Up Paddling Puerto Rico
programme.desc: Explore the magical stand-up paddling opportunities that Puerto Rico has to offer…from a competitive race, to epic surf breaks.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep208: Kayak Fishing Stand-Up Paddling in Puerto Rico
programme.desc: Join stand-up paddling legend Mike Simpson on his circumnavigation of Puerto Rico, and experience catching 150lb tarpon from a kayak.

programme.title: Xplash Ep105
programme.desc: Xplash brings you eye-popping water-related action from around the globe. In this episode, we’ll visit Bandon, Oregon to check out the creation of a sandy labyrinth; ride on the Billabong Clipper to surf remote locations around the globe; and get a taste of the multi-sport party known as the Swatch Free-4-Style.

programme.title: The Olin Sisters - Pachamama
programme.desc: A sun-drenched short film about soul, surf and sisterhood. Pachamama follows Mathea and Sanoa Olin’s journey to become professional surfers in the harsh coldwater waves off the west coast of Canada. Filmed by director Ross Allen during The Rip Curl Pro Tofino.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: Happy Recluse
programme.desc: For many years Pete Devries and Jeremy Koreski have been on a mission to surf the best waves Vancouver Island has to offer. In particular, they return again and over to a wave with potential for a legendary session. In the process, Pete tells of his life as a ”Happy Recluse," at home in cold water.

programme.title: Roxy Presents: New Colors
programme.desc: Faced with the winter waters of Norway, four female professional surfers step out of their comfort zone, push their boundaries and redefine their approach to surfing. Beyond competition sites, they reconnect with the pleasure of sharing their passion through a unique cold water experience.

programme.title: Billabong Presents: The Cape
programme.desc: What happens when good winds, good weather, and a solid swell come together along one of the rawest stretches of coastline on the planet? You don't stop. Surfers Taj Burrow, Shaun Manners, Jaleesa Vincent, and Matt Bromley test their staying power on this Adventure Division strike mission.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: The Backyard
programme.desc: At Pipeline there is flora, fauna, ocean and stone. Volcom Stone. At this point, the Volcom house is practically part of the reef. Between the team, the family, the legacy, the peanut gallery, the respect, the Pipe Pro and the barbecues, you’d be hard pressed not to notice Volcom on the North Shore.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: XO - Coco Ho
programme.desc: Step into the world of pro surfer Coco Ho. Raised on Oahu’s North Shore, the film explores how Ho got started in the water, her surfing family history, and the ups and downs of the Championship Tour. Featuring brother Mason Ho, father Michael Ho, and surfers John John Florence and Stephanie Gilmore.

programme.title: Kaiwi Winds
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Tweakin' On Boards With Ryan Burch
programme.desc: Tweakin’ on Boards was shot in 2009. Seems like a second ago and forever ago. Truth is it’s both. As a surfer and filmmaker, Burch isn’t content complaining everything's already been done. Says fellow surfer Cyrus Sutton, “He needs to FEEL history for himself.” This film is that and more.

programme.title: Atoms and Void - Lay Down Your Weapons
programme.desc: “Lay Down Your Weapons” is a respite from the cacophony of the world. Atoms and Void is musician Arlie Carstens, of Seattle’s Juno, and producer Eric Fisher. Known for his skateboarding films, Director Greg Hunt here lets landscapes and cityscapes slowly unfold. Breathe deeply, watch and listen.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 1: Don’t Lie Down
programme.desc: In 1953, W. Horace Carter won the Pulitzer Prize for his editorials opposing the KKK. This brave work lead to the FBI’s takedown of the Carolina Klans. Today, The Carters continue to champion civil rights and the environment. Grandson Wes Carter now fights for the world’s waterways. Don’t lie down.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 2: Plastic, Plastic, Everywhere
programme.desc: We join pro surfer and Journey To A New Earth advocate Koa Smith to learn about the problem of microplastics on Oahu’s North Shore. We explore efforts underway to fix the issue and spotlight a few of the ways entrepreneurs are utilizing the reclaimed materials to develop new innovative products.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 3: Walking the Walk
programme.desc: Ron Artisi has sandy toes. When taking a closer look with the crew from Sustainable Coastlines Hawaii, his world is shattered. Bob Hurley shares the tale of a young woman building an army to clean the rivers in Bali. Wes Carter explores Fishbone Carriers, the alternative to plastic 6-pack rings.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 4: No More Bubbles
programme.desc: In Episode 4 of Journey to a New Earth, Wes Carter of Atlantic Packaging talks with water photographer Clark Little, shaper Jon Pyzel, and big wave rider Kai Lenny. They join the journey, offering insights and solutions for the problematic issue of single-use plastics in the surf industry.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 5: Clean This Mess Up
programme.desc: In Episode 5, we talk with 11x World Surf League Champion, Kelly Slater, about the growing problem of plastic pollution around the world. We learn about the ways he’s chosen to make a difference with his company, Outerknown, and discuss the power of community to make real and lasting change.

programme.title: Missle 3
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: The Olin Sisters - Pachamama
programme.desc: A sun-drenched short film about soul, surf and sisterhood. Pachamama follows Mathea and Sanoa Olin’s journey to become professional surfers in the harsh coldwater waves off the west coast of Canada. Filmed by director Ross Allen during The Rip Curl Pro Tofino.

programme.title: Titans of Business
programme.desc: There have been many stories and documentaries on the Bill Gates’, Steve Jobs’ and Henry Fords’ of the world. What about the thousands of other business people, that had a better idea or way to make life better, cheaper, and faster? People who started out from meager beginnings or limited education, to become very wealthy! Many of these people are among us and act no differently than we do, but they have a success story to tell and tricks of success to share. These are the people profiled in “Titans of Business”.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 1: Eventing Dreams and New Forest Commoning
programme.desc: On this first episode of FEI Ride, we're in the saddle with the first ever Chinese Olympic Eventing Rider before roaming free with the New Forest Ponies of England and testing the stamina of horse and rider at the Longines FEI Endurance World Championship. Join us for a ride!

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 2: Kuwaiti Aspirations Therapeutic Riding
programme.desc: On this week’s RIDE we’re in Kuwait for a look at the country’s jumping community past and present, meeting the British woodsman using logging horses to minimise his impact on the environment, making a positive difference to the lives of disabled children in New Zealand with the help of therapy horses, and aiming for Tokyo with Mexican rider Francisco Pasquel.

programme.title: Polo Rider Cup Competition - Moscow Polo Club vs Hamburger Polo Club
programme.desc: In order to advance to the following rounds, Moscow Polo Club will have to face Hamburger Polo Club in this first stage of the Polo Rider Cup 2021. With a 10/12 goals handicap and 5 chukkers, competition between the strongest polo teams in the world is on at the Polo Club de Chantilly. Enjoy the match between Moscow Polo Club and Hamburger Polo Club.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Nature Walks
programme.desc: Experience the beauty and serenity of Hawaii’s Tropical Botanical Garden. Enjoy the sights and sounds of tropical flora, birds, and gentle streams, offering a perfect escape into nature.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Water
programme.desc: Bring the Vancouver Aquarium to life on your screen! Witness the stunning diversity of marine life and vibrant fish, accompanied by peaceful music and the graceful movement of seaweed. This calming video lets you relax and escape into the wonders of the ocean.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Wildlife
programme.desc: Discover the untamed beauty of Oman in this captivating video, showcasing majestic wildlife, serene landscapes, and the harmonious sounds of nature, from camels crossing peaks to flamingos painting the sunset sky.

programme.title: Go Green!
programme.desc: Toyota attempted to break the lap record for electric vehicles at the Nürburgring Nordschleife with their TMg EV P001. Also: highlights from the 2012 Tokyo Motor Show. In addition: the Mitsubishi i-MiEV at the Euro NCAP test.

programme.title: Go Green!
programme.desc: The Honda CR-Z promises both driving pleasure and low emissions. We put this model to the test. Also: the prototype of Seat's Altea XL Electric Ecomotive and a look at the 2012 Essen Motor Show. And: Skoda's green Line models.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Station Wagons like the Volvo V60 Polestar aren't just family vans anymore but basically very roomy sports cars. Mercedes followed a more luxurious approach with their E43 AMG T model. And: the ultimate powerhouse station wagon, the Audi RS6.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Even though the Mercedes-AMG A45 Performmaster has just four cylinders, its sound is similar to its V8-colleagues by AMG. Also: the car tuning company MTM offers a similarly powerful alternative, based on an Audi: the RS3 R.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: 4-door coupes combine the best of two worlds, the performance of a coupe and the style of a limousine. We took a closer look at three examples of this car subspecies, the Audi A7, BMW's 4 Series Gran Coupe, and the Mercedes-Benz CLA models.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Some people claim that hybrid cars are neither fish nor fowl. Audi's reaction was the A3 e-tron. The all-electric BMW i3 went a step further, offering a range extender. Also: the Mitsubishi Outlander, the first plug-in hybrid SUV in the world.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Do you want to feel like a racing driver without being limited to a race track? If so, the British manufacturer Radical is the right choice, as the company builds race cars with road approval. Their RXC is a powerful and agile racer.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche Cayenne Turbo and the Range Rover Supercharged are big and have a lot of power, so that they could even take on sports cars. Also: with the Bentayga, Bentley presented the brand's first SUV model. And: the Jaguar F-Pace.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Aston Martin V12 Vantage S Roadster with its 6-litre V12 engine is probably the most amazing export from the UK. In addition: a mountain cruise from dawn to sundown with the Corvette C7 Convertible.

programme.title: Go Green!
programme.desc: Citroen's C-Zero is the brand's first foray into electric mobility. Also: Mercedes-Benz sent three of their hydrogen-powered F-Cell models around the world. And: the Volvo V60 plug-in, an electric car, hybrid model and turbo diesel at the same time.

programme.title: Go Green!
programme.desc: With their Active Safety concept, Audi introduced several technological innovations. Also: electric and hybrid highlights from the 2012 North American International Auto Show. And: BMW's ActiveHybrid models, Audi's A6 Hybrid.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: In 2014, Mercedes-Benz presented their first Plug-in Hybrid, the S500. When it comes to Bentley, a V8 engine means down-sizing. We took a look at the brand's Flying Spur model with a smaller engine. And: the 6th generation Maserati Quattroporte.

programme.title: The Iconic

programme.title: Because
programme.desc: A high-end freeski documentary following 22 professional athletes across record snowfall winters, facing deep powder, massive cliffs, and extreme expeditions, while sharing their ambition, discipline, and drive to reach the next level of their careers.

programme.title: Begging For Change
programme.desc: This movie is about the lives of strange and exhilarating men, begging for change, and living a life that is fast, cheap, and affordable. All the things that make up a great ski movie

programme.title: Chaiyo Premiere Tour
programme.desc: A skate documentary following a 10-day tour across Thailand, featuring demos and premieres in several cities, capturing the energy of local skate scenes and the passion of skaters coming together to celebrate.

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: European Dragon Championship
programme.desc: The European Dragon Championship promises to amaze spectators with the continent’s top dragon sailors racing in one of the world’s most beautiful sailing arenas, the Italian Riviera.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 1 - Depart
programme.desc: Every two years, the city of Concarneau in southern Finistère hosts the start of the Transat AG2R La Mondiale: the double-handed transatlantic on identical boats, founded over 25 years ago. This time, 15 boats line up on the quay of Carnot to make legend in this incredible competition. Let's dive into the action in France!

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to the second event of the 2021 GC32 Racing Tour. You are about to see all of the foiling action from Lagos on Portugal's beautiful Algarve! As usual, on the GC32 Racing Tour each venue has been selected to provide the best conditions for the nimble GC32s to fly at 30+ knots speeds. But - spoiler alert... in this episode you'll see them racing at almost 40 knots! Lagos is once more in the center of the sailing universe with the GC32 Lagos Cup 2. Appropriately coinciding with the Olympic Games, the event included some of the sailing's leading names, including several multiple Olympic medallists.

programme.title: La Ruta de la Sal - Ruta de la Sal 2023
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 3
programme.desc: In this episode, we focus on the French team. They dominated the KiteFoil World Series scene, with many great performances. We’ll zoom in on Axel Mazella who clinched the Kitefoil European title and his second Kitefoil World title last season. Finally, we meet four-time World Champion, Daniela Moroz, who’ll share some tips for how to gybe in the best possible way.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 4
programme.desc: We are finally back to action! After months of waiting due to the Covid-19 pandemic, athletes and sports enthusiasts had the chance to return to some high-end performances and demanding racing; for the 2020 Formula Kite Mixed Team Relay European Championships that took place in Ebensee - Lake Traunsee, Austria. Relieve the best moments on Kite Masters.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 1 - Nelson Mandela Pro
programme.desc: The first event of the South African WQS during series kicks off in Nelson Mandela Bay. Challenging conditions make it even tougher for surfers to get the vital points they need to advance. Will they have what it takes to raise to the top? Don’t miss all the action, the disappointments and victories at the start of what will be an epic African series.

programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: Dirty Conscience
programme.desc: A cop thriller from Chile.Two young police recruits are assigned a tough, decorated Officer to train them. It quickly becomes clear that their new boss is involved with serious corruption. At first the two young cops try to look the other way. But as their boss begins to doubt their loyalty, the two recruits must choose between saving their honor and their careers--before their boss has them killed.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Haunted Boat
programme.desc: HAUNTED BOAT is a mystical, mind-twisting psychological horror film about six teenagers going on a boat trip and getting lost in parallel dimensions where they have to face their greatest fears.

programme.title: Insidious Inferno
programme.desc: A secluded cottage is plagued by a series of gruesome murders, unbeknownst to the inhabitants something other worldly lurks within the halls.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E10 - Rural Road Huntin
programme.desc: Opening week of firearms deer season is extremely active; officers in districts three and six tackle road hunting issues in rural Michigan.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E08 - Turtle Smugglers and Wire Fraud
programme.desc: In "Turtle Smugglers," they tell the surprising story of a big smuggling operation for these slow reptiles. "Wire Fraud" shares a sad story about getting scammed on social media. Game Wardens talk about old stories and memorable investigations from their work.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E09 - Operation Bruin and Peanut Road
programme.desc: Game Wardens dive into a challenging case with 'Operation Bruin'. Later, they share a funny tale about a decoy deer mishap in 'Peanut Road'. Wardens also reminisce about memorable investigations from their experiences.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S01:E07 - Surf's Up

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S01:E08 - Closing Time

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E45 - Charles A Portrait A Man Alone
programme.desc: This tells the tale of a man juggling the stress of his public obligations with the challenges of a failing marriage that's playing out in front of the world. It's a special look at the man fated to become King.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E44 - 50 Glorious Years A Royal Celebration
programme.desc: Honoring 50 years of marriage between Her Majesty the Queen and her husband, Prince Philip of Greece and Denmark, the Duke of Edinburgh.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E01 - Diana A Portrait
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, was incredibly enchanting and unforgettable, leaving a lasting impact like no other woman of her era. Known as a fairy-tale princess, a loving wife, a dedicated mother, and a style icon, this documentary digs deeper to uncover the true person behind the endless spotlight.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: To avoid further confrontations between the Guanipa and Del Casal families, Sergio threatens to take control of Cantarrana from Victoria, but an imposing woman refuses to lose her land. From her new home in the United States, a worried Adelaida contacts her mother to find out if her daughter has finally forgiven Hilario. Without Victoria's consent, Sergio arrives at the hacienda Los Samanes to give Nicolás a sum of money as payment for the flooding of the cornfields caused by Victoria, who arrives at that moment; Nicolás assures that he could take Cantarrana from Victoria since the farmers in the area were harmed, but Sergio hits Nicolás hard to prevent him from doing so.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Gertrudis has the weapon to end her husband, but Marco Aurelio wakes up and she returns to reality. Don Lucio wants to know what the problem is with the dollar account. Elvis woos Virginia. Malena experiences the decline of her relationship with Pablo. Alberto makes contact with Ignacio who tells him that his grandmother mistreats him. Lorena decides to talk to Gertrudis but is petrified to see how the respectable Mrs. Corona and her brother-in-law Claudio kiss passionately.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Lorena resigns at the Corona house. Ricardo is still stunned by his mother about the million dollars they lost. Lorena; among the shelves of the antique shop discovers the figure of Gertrudis talking to the delinquent, thus confirming her terrible suspicion that it is Alberto's own mother who wants to end the life of her husband, Marco Aurelio Corona.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Magda tells Omar about the existence of Lorena's video-confession and he demands to reveal its contents. Omar appears before Pedro and tells him about the video that incriminates him in the death of Marco Aurelio Corona; Lobo can hardly hide his surprise and fury.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Alberto takes Ignacio to the hospital to be treated by Dr. Olimpo, while he continues trying to contact Lorena by phone. Without any compassion, Pedro murders Magda in cold blood before Lorena's eyes.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: On a new day; Salvatore warns Nacho that he wants him to finish Adriana that same day.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Carlos Raul says he found Adriana sitting on the floor with a gun in her hand next to Azalea's bloody body.

programme.title: PLANETA VINOS
programme.desc: Programa que explora fascinantes destinos turísticos y culturas diversas, ofreciendo recomendaciones y experiencias únicas para los amantes de los viajes.

programme.title: CONECTADOS
programme.desc: Programa religioso que ofrece enseñanzas y reflexiones sobre la fe.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel le confirma a Camila parte de los secretos que oculta: Patricia y su cuñada María Amelia fueron las que denunciaron a su madre. Luciano recibe un sobre que contiene la foto de Camila niña, con su vestidito amarillo, y detrás, una mujer protegiéndola.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Las cuatro mujeres que destruyeron la vida de Rosa Blanco se reencuentran en una casa vacía. Camila se enfrenta a Fausto acusando a Patricia de ser la asesina de Leoncio. Otra vez un motorizado le advierte que no siga buscando a su mamá y le arrebata la carta.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Mucha confusión en Camila, nada justifica las mentiras y cada vez Camila está más decepcionada de los engaños de la Madre Isabel. Ezequiel confronta a Julia y agrede salvajemente a Gregorio al encontrarlos juntos.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel confiesa a Camila pero la muchacha sabe que aún miente. Jeli, su hermanita, sufre por la irresponsabilidad de Fernando, que la embarazó. Max anuncia a Marcelina y Astrid que pronto se casará con Camila.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Marcelina visita a la Madre Isabel para hablarle sobre su relación con Rosa Blanco, quien fue su mejor amiga y ella la traicionó; por eso quiere impedir su regreso.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ante una llamada telefónica de Rosa Blanco a Luciano, Camila, ilusionada, quiere hablar con su mamá. El Capitán Torrealba la ayude a entender los secretos que existen sobre el crimen. Ante la brutal agresión a Sebastián, Ezequiel quiere vengarla con Fernando, un Aragón.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricia y María Amelia habían denunciado el crimen de la muerte de Leoncio. Torrealba las enfrenta pues quiere saber cómo fue que Rosa mató a Leoncio. Patricia, desesperada, bebe sin freno. Ante su descontrol, el detective, capcioso, duda de ella.

programme.title: Amateur
programme.desc: Martín, es un editor que trabaja en un canal de televisión cuyo dueño es el señor Battaglia.

programme.title: Catemaco: Magia y Misterio
programme.desc: Una familia normal va de vacaciones a Catemaco, Michoacan un pueblo famoso y pintoresco en Mexico. Todo marcha bien hasta que son atacados por criminales, el padre sobrevive, y con ayuda del brujo mayor del pueblo cobra venganza.

programme.title: Entre Brujas y Nahuales
programme.desc: En la ciudad de Tulancingo Hidalgo, Acatlán y San Dionicio la gente anda muy asustada, pues se rumora que están ocurriendo sucesos fuera de lo normal, tal como desaparición de niños de quienes se han encontrado cuerpos sin sangre, dicen que son las brujas, porque han visto bolas de fuego que aparecen y desaparecen, pero nadie sabe la verdad lo que esta pasando y existe mucho miedo en la población de la región.

programme.title: Cartero
programme.desc: Hernán Sosa es un joven tímido que viene del interior a la ciudad. En su pueblo siempre estuvo enamorado de una chica inalcanzable, Yanina. Hernán consigue trabajo en el correo. Durante el reparto, Hernán descubre que Yanina se encuentra en la ciudad, en la zona de su reparto. En consecuencia, comienza a desplegar sus nuevos conocimientos de cartero para llegar hasta ella. Pero a medida que se acerca, descubre que unos viejos carteros están organizando un robo en el mismo edificio donde trabaja Yanina. Envalentonado por la fuerza del amor, Hernán se enfrentará a los peligros que rodean a Yanina para llegar a declararle lo que siente.

programme.title: [object Object]
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Vidas Violentas
programme.desc: integrada por seis cortometrajes escritos y dirigidos por seis de los más connotados directores mexicanos, la película fue realizada y dirigida para concientizar y reducir la violencia de género, el acoso escolar en las escuelas y la violencia doméstica. Proviene de una iniciativa del gobierno en el marco de la campaña basta no violencia

programme.title: Despertar El Polvo
programme.desc: Es la historia de un hombre que ha sufrido las desgracias de vivir una vida trasgredida por la delincuencia y corrupción, el barrio de Iztapalapa es el escenario donde vaga por las calles, invisible, ignorado y solitario, sumido en su miseria. Un evento desafortunado mueve el instinto protector de Chano que intenta regresar al mundo del crimen para lograr sacar a su ahijado de la cárcel.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.
